name: Correlation Report
description: Computes how strongly each pair of numeric columns is related (correlation). Output is a long-format table (column_a, column_b, correlation) ready to visualize as a heatmap in Superset.

name.label: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this node in the pipeline

method.label: Correlation Method
method.description: Pearson: linear relationships (most common). Spearman: works on ranked data, handles non-linear. Kendall: slower but robust on small datasets.

columns.label: Columns to Analyze
columns.description: Comma-separated numeric column names to include. Leave blank to use all numeric columns.

outputDescription: Correlation table: column_a, column_b, correlation (-1 to 1)
